routes.title: Cisco IOS — Free Practice

routes.title: Cisco IOS — Full Switch Configuration - Start to Finish
routes.description: Configure a fresh simulated Cisco switch manually: name it, create a VLAN, configure two access ports, verify, and save.
routes.hidden_fault: Every command is typed by you. The coach only shows the next safe goal.

routes.final_state_validation_method: local CLI output and guided verification
hints: Every command is typed by you. The coach only shows the next safe goal.
